domains.name: Logical-Mathematical Intelligence
domains.description: Focuses on training theory, mathematical reasoning, AI4Math / AI4Science, and AI infrastructure to understand how AI develops capabilities in logic-intensive tasks.

domains.name: Linguistic-Verbal Intelligence
domains.description: Explores the frontier of natural language processing, large language models, and human language understanding.

domains.name: Visual-Spatial Intelligence
domains.description: Covers computer vision, image generation, and multimodal understanding.

domains.name: Bodily-Kinesthetic Intelligence
domains.description: Covers robotics, reinforcement learning, and interaction with the physical world.

domains.name: Musical-Rhythmic Intelligence
domains.description: Covers audio generation, music understanding, and speech synthesis.

domains.name: Interpersonal Intelligence
domains.description: Covers multi-agent systems, social AI, and collaborative reasoning.

domains.name: Intrapersonal Intelligence
domains.description: Covers meta-learning, self-reflection, and machine self-awareness.

domains.name: Naturalist Intelligence
domains.description: Covers scientific discovery, AI for Science, and exploration of natural laws.
